New Financial Model

Choose a starting point for your model

Import from PDF or Excel

After creating your blank model, use the Importbutton in the model workspace to upload your project's financial spreadsheet or PDF. The AI will extract assumptions field-by-field — you review and approve each one before it enters the model.
